calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wallis Lim for and with Ernest Chin (Administrator).

Mr. Chin stated that the law suit was a wrongful death suit and is not related to the Estate and that the Estate was not a party to the litigation. Mr. Chin stated that the personal loan was from Mr. Chin's wife and that he was not aware of anyone objecting. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
